extra.reason: Implemented initial generic core slice with CLI, Nu wrapper, descriptors, tests, docs, and benchmarks.
Implemented descriptor fixture harness with isolated positive/negative fixtures, expected row assertions, and full-registry duplicate-id coverage.
Added cargo-test performance regression gates and documented conservative budgets alongside Criterion baselines.
Documented debug instrumentation threat model, explicit trace-first policy, and strict gates for any future harness-only side channel.
Added optional Nix-backed integration fixture, opt-in execution gate, and documentation for non-system CLI isolation.
Added native nu_plugin_golden_magic binary exporting from golden-magic and integration-tested isolated Nu plugin registration/use.
Created public GitHub repository and pushed local history to origin/master.
Implemented native Nu plugin descriptor/config loading parity with integration coverage.
Added docs/PRIOR-ART.md with source-grounded research and architecture implications.
Added docs/EXTENSIONS.md defining descriptor, subprocess, WASM/WASI, and forbidden native-loading boundaries. Native runtime loading remains unimplemented by design.
Added a representative known-tool descriptor corpus with fixture coverage under the current descriptor schema. Grammar-heavy real outputs remain covered by golden-magic-2mf.
Descriptor-pack SDK implemented with validation CLI, schema, docs, examples, fixture guidance, and CLI tests.

Investigated Criterion output: hard perf gate passes, Criterion exits 0, medium TSV shows small regression against untracked local target/criterion baseline while large/header improved. Documented current results and baseline policy in docs/PERFORMANCE.md without updating baselines.

Implemented parser-backend/grammar-like parsing slice: backend selection in core, descriptor backend validation/listing, heuristic and sections backends, stable trace ids, sectioned fixture corpus, unit/property/CLI/descriptor tests, malformed-input diagnostics, and documented tree-sitter deferral with evidence and future-entry criteria.

Descriptor-driven Nix manifest harness implemented and live-verified with GOLDEN_MAGIC_RUN_NIX_FIXTURES=1 inside disposable nixos/nix:latest Docker container; host without nix now fails opt-in honestly instead of false-passing.

Added docs/NATIVE-RUNTIME-REVIEW.md and linked it from extension docs, audit, and OpenSpec. Native runtime loading remains rejected until explicit approval and ABI/security/portability/test gates are satisfied.

Implemented approved tree-sitter backend using tree-sitter and tree-sitter-rust dependencies. Added tree-sitter-rust backend selection, stable trace ids, Rust declaration row extraction, CLI/descriptor fixture coverage, descriptor schema update, docs, tool-pack data model, and verification gates.

Implemented operational plugin-as-data loading: config tool_pack_dirs, --tool-pack-dir, --validate-tool-pack-dir, --list-tool-packs, descriptor-reference validation, CLI tests, docs, corpus seed manifest and manifest checks. Verified live temp descriptor/tool-pack validation and listing plus full gates.

Added tests/generated_matrix.rs with a hard 2,000-case floor and 2,400 deterministic generated cases across delimiter parsing, first-row headers, fallback lines, sections backend, tree-sitter Rust backend, and tool-pack loader. Added docs/TEST-MATRIX.md and audit/spec references. Verified generated matrix prints 2400 cases and full gates pass.

Added reproducible GitHub-star CLI corpus collector script, fetched 100-entry seed using query 'topic:cli stars:>1000', stored source_query/fetched_at/stars/language/description, enforced rank/uniqueness/descending stars in tests, and documented path toward 10k corpus. Verified corpus_manifest plus full gates.
Implemented partitioned corpus collector, refreshed seed manifest, and added manifest checks/docs.
Added reusable descriptor fixture support and refactored descriptor/Nix fixture tests onto it.
Native Nu plugin now accepts declarative tool-pack dirs, validates descriptor refs through shared loader, and can list loaded tool packs.
Added descriptor-selected executable-json parser backend with relative executable resolution, fixture plugin, CLI tests, schema, and docs.
Executable JSON plugins now support a v1 envelope and enforce timeout/stdout/stderr caps with deterministic failure tests.
Corpus seed now has explicit found/analyzed/modeled/deterministic/agentic lifecycle fields with manifest checks and documented completion math.
Advanced git/git and BurntSushi/ripgrep to analyzed/modeled/deterministic-tested with descriptor fixture evidence, including a new ripgrep executable-json fixture.
Added agentic run evidence manifest and verifier; advanced git and ripgrep corpus entries to agentic-tested with matching manifest rows.
Expanded query partitions and made corpus refresh preserve lifecycle/modeling evidence, with retry/backoff for GitHub secondary rate limits.

Fixed GitHub query tokenization, refreshed corpus to 1,379 entries from 24 partitions, preserved git/ripgrep modeled agentic evidence, and passed fmt/clippy/default/nu/corpus/generated/performance test gates.

Added per-partition GitHub search cache/resume controls to the corpus fetcher; smoke verified 24 cached partitions were reused; corpus manifest, fmt, clippy, default tests, nu-plugin tests, generated matrix, and performance gate passed.

Expanded objective GitHub-star query grid from 24 to 61 partitions, refreshed corpus from 1,379 to 2,980 entries with 59 cached partitions and 2 live replacement fetches on the final run, preserved modeled/agentic lifecycle claims, and passed fmt/clippy/corpus/generated/default/nu/performance gates.

Added generated 640-partition objective corpus query grid, cache-only partial materialization controls, and refreshed the seed from 268 cached partitions to 5,183 entries. Full 640 live fetch remains incomplete due GitHub rate limits; tests and gates passed.

Added 1-based start/end partition controls and a guard against bounded live shards overwriting the default seed. Fetched shard 269..320 with 1 cache hit, 51 live fetches, 3 retries; cache-only combined materialization grew corpus to 5,906 entries from 319/640 cached partitions. Gates passed.
Fetched shard 321..372 with 1 cache hit, 51 live fetches, 4 retries; cache-only combined materialization grew corpus to 6,205 entries from 370/640 cached partitions. Gates passed.
Fetched shard 373..424 with 52 live fetches and 5 retries; cache-only combined materialization grew corpus to 6,394 entries from 422/640 cached partitions. Gates passed.
Fetched shard 425..476 with 52 live fetches and 5 retries; cache-only combined materialization grew corpus to 6,695 entries from 474/640 cached partitions. Gates passed.
Fetched shard 477..528 with 52 live fetches and 5 retries; cache-only combined materialization grew corpus to 6,739 entries from 526/640 cached partitions. Gates passed.

Fetched shard 529..580 with 52 live fetches and 6 retries; cache-only combined materialization reached 6,740 entries from 578/640 cached partitions. Unique corpus growth was only +1, but discovery coverage advanced. Gates passed.

Fetched final generated-grid shard 581..640 plus missing partitions 267..268; cache-only materialization now covers 640/640 partitions and yields 6,800 unique repos. This proves the current generated grid is below the 10k target and needs broader discovery strategy. Gates passed.

Added 60 keyword/star partitions beyond the exhausted topic grid, fetched them with 60 live fetches and 0 retries, and materialized 700/700 partitions. Corpus grew from 6,800 to 9,713 entries; still 287 short of 10k. Gates passed.

Added 25..50 star tail partitions, fetched 20 live partitions with 700 cache hits and 0 retries, materialized 11,182 ranked CLI/tool candidates from 720/720 partitions, redaction check passed, corpus manifest/fmt/clippy gates passed.
Superseded by direct close below

Added corpus/modeling.seed.json and scripts/apply_corpus_modeling_seed.js; advanced ripgrep, git, gh, aws-cli, and docker/cli to analyzed/modeled/deterministic/agentic; agentic manifest now has 5 runs; corpus_manifest/fmt/clippy/full cargo test passed.

Added yt-dlp, youtube-dl, curl write-out, and just-list descriptor fixtures; advanced modeled/deterministic/agentic corpus coverage from 5 to 9; descriptor_fixtures, corpus_manifest, fmt, clippy, full cargo test, and secret-pattern checks passed.
